titleStmt.title: SII 23.175: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 175. (A.R. No. 175 of 1907.) Tiruppalātturai, Tiruchirappalli Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District Ādimūlēśvara temple—on the north wall of the central shrine Rājarāja I: year 21: 1005-06 A.D.

summary.p: This registers a sale of two plots of land one measuring 3 mā and 3 kāṇi in extent and the other a quarter (vēli) by the Peruṅguri-sabhā of Uttamaśīli-chaturvēdimaṅgalam a brahmadēya in Viḷānāḍu a division of Pāṇḍikulāśani-vaḷanāḍu to the temple of Mahādēva-Bhaṭṭāra at Tiruppāttuṟai for 97 kaḻañju equivalent to 900 poṉ. The former is said to have formed part of a bigger land which had been endowed to the temple on a previous occasion by one Kurukāḍi-kiḻār and which the sabhā had purchased from the temple. Portion of it was resold to the temple in the 20th year of the king and the remaining part now.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumakaḷpola perunila celviyu
m tanakke Urimaipūṇṭamai manakkoḷa kān=taḷūrcālai
kalamaṟuttaruḷi kaṅkapāṭiyum ṉuḷampapāṭiyum
taṭikaipāṭiyum kuṭamalaināṭum kollamum kaliṅkamum
Eṇṭikai pukaḻtara Īḻamaṇṭalamum tiṇṭiṟal
venṟi taṇṭāl koṇṭa taneḻil vaḷar Ūḻiyuḷ ḷelā
yāṇṭun toḻutaka viḷaṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻiyarait tecukoḷ
śrīkorājarāja rājakecaripanmarāna śrīrājarājadevaṟkku yā
ṇṭu 2 10 1 Āvatu tenkarai pāṇṭikulācanivaḷa
nāṭṭu viḷāṉāṭṭu brahmadeyam śrī Uttamaciliccaturvetimaṅ
kalattup peruṅkuṟi mahāsabhaiyom Ivvūr tiruppāttuṟai
Uṭaiya mahādevabhaṭṭārarkku sabhaiyom viṟṟukkuṭutta ni
lamāvatu Ivvūr Uṭkuṟaiyvāy śrīkāmukavatikku meṟkkum Ātittavāy
kkālukku vaṭakkum kiḻakkuniṉṟum 4 kaṇṇāṟṟum 5 kaṇṇāṟṟum kaṇṇā
ṟṟil teṟkaṭaiya Upa mā nikkiya Itukku vaṭakku pālavāykkut teṟku
muṉpu Ittevarkkey kurukāṭikiḻār ceyta dharmmamāy Itu Iṟaṅkiya
Innilattukku sabhaiyom śrī paṇṭārattukku kācu vaittu sabhai yomi
tāyk kiṭanta nilam nāṉku mā mukkāṇi ciṉṉattu muṉpu Idevarkke yāṇṭu
2 10Āvatu poṉkoṇṭu viṟṟu Iṟaiyiḻiccik kuṭutta nilam mākāṇi nik
ki Itanoṭumaṭaiya viṟṟukkuṭutta nila mummāvaraic ciṉṉamum Itaṉoṭu Aṭai
ya pālaivāy vilaikoṇṭatu kāṇiyum Āka Inṉila muṉṟumāmu
kkāṇiyum Ivvatikke meṟku Ivvāykkālukku vaṭakku Iraṇṭā
ṅkaṇṇāṟṟu munṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟum marutūr māṟanārāyaṇabhaṭṭan
Uḷḷiṭṭa catukkattārkkup paṭṭa Eḻām pāṭakattukku meṟku śrī
koyilukkum tirumuṟṟattukkum kiḻakku Inṉaṭuvupaṭṭa nilam
�mana ṉam nilam tuvvūruṭaiyān Ittevarkke dharmam ce
ytu Itu Iṟaṅki sabhaiyom śrī paṇṭārattuk kācu vait
tu sabhaiyomitāyk kiṭanta Innilam ha�ccinṉamum Itaṉ kottam
Āṟum Āṟiṭupaṭukaiyu makappaṭa Inilam Iraṇṭu kiṭakkaiyumāy
kha Ikkālceyum Ittevarkku mahāsabhaiyom viṟṟu
kkuṭuttu koṇṭa vilaippoṉ tippokkuc cempoṉ kaḻañ
cilpperttu Uraiyuntuḷaiyum vātatu Ivvūrāṭukal
kkallāl koṇṭa pon 9 10 7- ḻukkuppon toḷḷāyiram .
Digital edition of SII 23.175 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
